examples: SideNote has fulfilled this contract to add a text box to the sidebar.
SideNote lives in the sidebar and consists entirely of a large text area.
After you have typed text into SideNote, you may want to email the contents.
What could have been a sidenote at a small blog is an international story.
On a sidenote: Eric, it makes me sad that you claim to have no life but that your new one is great.
